mnemonics.title: STRING ADT
mnemonics.content: Seven operations to recall: StrLen, StrConcat, SubStr, StrCompare, StrInsert, StrDelete, StrIndex. Use 'SCISSORS' to cut through and remember each!

mnemonics.title: KMP Failure Function
mnemonics.content: Failure function in four steps: (1) Match, (2) Mismatch - go back, (3) No match at start - move forward, (4) Build table - don't forget the last step!

mnemonics.title: Pattern Matching Algorithms
mnemonics.content: Naive is N^2, KMP is N+M. Think 'Naked Kitten Makes Progress' to remember the time complexities of these two algorithms!

mnemonics.title: Linked List Strings
mnemonics.content: O(1) for concat, O(n) for access. 'Lazy Lions Sleep Nicely' - Linked Lists Save Navigation (to the end)!

mnemonics.title: String Representations
mnemonics.content: Three types to recall: Fixed Array (good for access), Dynamic Array (balances space and time), Linked List (excels at insert/delete). 'Father Doesn't Love' - Fixed, Dynamic, Linked!
